title: agentify-task
description: Logical shape of a single task within a plan's tasks artifact. Drivers map this onto Sub-tasks (Jira), checklist items (Notion), issues (Linear), or bullets in tasks.md (markdown).

validation.description: Falsifiable signal — a shell command, test command, HTTP response, audit finding closure, etc. The lifecycle-conformance CI gate enforces presence; the /<prefix>-prd skill enforces non-vague wording.

depends_on.description: Optional list of task ids this task depends on. Used by /<prefix>-implement when parallelism > 1.
